---
title: "CASA0007 Quantitative Methods — materials"
description: "Module materials repository for CASA0007 Quantitative Methods at UCL CASA."
author: "Adam Dennett"
date: "2025-10-09"
categories: [teaching, R, statistics, UCL]
---

Working repository of materials related to **CASA0007 Quantitative Methods**,
a postgraduate methods module I teach at UCL's Bartlett Centre for Advanced
Spatial Analysis.

- [Open the site →](https://adamdennett.github.io/casa0007_qm/)
- [Source on GitHub](https://github.com/adamdennett/casa0007_qm)
